title: cassia desvauxii
intro: Cassia desvauxii, also known as the Chinese cinnamon or golden bush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Cassia desvauxii has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing symptoms of diabetes. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
